results.title: Noble Helium prepares North Rukwa drilling as global supply pressures build
results.description: Noble Helium Ltd (ASX:NHE, OTC:NBHEF, FRA:GN1) has outlined plans for its upcoming North Rukwa drilling program in Tanzania while highlighting growing disruption across the global helium market that could strengthen future demand for new supply sources. results.title: Hasaacas Ladies beat Army Ladies on penalties to win Women’s FA Cup
results.description: The Hasmal Ladies won 5-3 on penalties after the two teams had played out a 1-1 draw in 120 minutes of play.

results.title: Axar Patel credits opening stand for Delhi Capitals’ win over Rajasthan Royals
results.description: Delhi Capitals skipper Axar Patel described the team's five-wicket victory over Rajasthan Royals on Sunday as a special win, particularly as it came at home

results.title: Mitchell Starc takes four wickets as Delhi Capitals beat Rajasthan Royals by five wickets
results.description: Veteran seamer Mitchell Starc credited Delhi Capitals' disciplined bowling and adaptability after his four-wicket haul helped secure a five-wicket victory

results.title: Riyan Parag says Rajasthan Royals fell short in five-wicket loss to Delhi Capitals
results.description: Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag expressed disappointment after his team’s five-wicket defeat to Delhi Capitals in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026

results.title: Raiders’ Mike Washington Jr. To Fill RB2 Role
results.description: After spending the No. 6 overall pick in the 2025 NFL Draft to select Boise State star running back Ashton Jeanty, the Raiders still finished the 2025 season with the fewest rushing yards in the league.

results.title: Kacey Musgraves Goes Vintage Pinup in Black Velvet and Ivory Ruffles at 2026 ACM Awards
results.description: The singer wore Tanner Fletcher fall 2026 with pointed black pumps and a curled bang before performing in Las Vegas.
